titleStmt.title: SII 36.272: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 272. (A.R. No. 272 of 1910.) TIRUVAḌANDAI, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Varāha Perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: The ūr of Taiyūr alias Rājakēsarinallūr in Kumiḻi-nāḍu, a subdivision of Āmūrk-kōṭṭam, which was a district of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam received 10 kaḻañcus of gold from Vallaṅkilāṉ Chāmi Chūṟṟi and sold 6 mā of land for providing sacred food to the Śrī Varākadēvar in the temple of Tiruviḍavandai. The ūr agreed to cultivate the land and pay 50 kalam of paddy to the sabhā of Tiruviḍavandai. The sabhā accepted to supply sacred food during the midday service in the temple. Mentions that one paṭṭi of land consisted of 1,000 kuḻis, measured by 16 (human) feet rod (patinaṟu-cāṇ-kōl).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumakaḷ polap perunilac celviyum tanakke Urimai pūṇṭa
mai maṉakkoḷa kān=taḷūrccālai kalamaruttaruḷi veṅkai nāṭuṅ kaṅka pāṭiyum nu
ḷampa pāṭiyun taṭikai vaḻiyuṅ kuṭamalai nāṭuṅ kollamuṅ kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pu
kaḻ tara Īḻa maṇṭalamum Iraṭṭapāṭi Ēḻarai Ilakkamum tiṇṭiṟal veṟṟi taṇṭāṟ koṇ
ṭa tanneḻil vaḷar Ūḻiuḷ Ellāviyāṇṭun toḻutakai viḷaṅkum yāṇ
ṭe ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ śrī kovirācakecaripanmarāna śrī rājarājatevarkku yā
ṇṭu 2 10 7 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu Āmūrk koṭṭattu kumiḻi nāṭṭu tai
yūrāna Irājakecari nallūr Ūroṅ kaiyeḻuttu Ikkoṭṭattup paṭuvūr nā
ṭṭu tevatāṉan=tiruviṭavantai vallaṅkiḻān cāmicūṟṟi kaiyāl yāṅkaḷ koṇ
ṭa pon kācukallāl tuḷainiṟai pon patin kaḻañcuṅ koṇṭa paricāvatu kīḻai
k koyil śrī varākadevarkku tiruvamutukku viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilamāvatu konapāttuk kā
l vaḻi tevaṭi nilattil muppatil taṭi Iraṇṭināl nilam Ēḻumāk kāṇik kīḻ mu
kkāle Orumāvum mūlaivāṇicceriku kālvaḻi cāmikaṇṭayanāna ceṟuvu nālum nān
ku mā mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum Ikkālvaḻikkoru mūlai nilam mummāvarai kā
ṇik kīḻk kāle mūnṟu māvum Amaṇpaṭṭik kālvaḻip peruṅkālin kīḻ Āṟumāvum
Āka patinaṟucāṇkolāl Āyiraṅkuḻi koṇṭatu paṭṭiyāka Innilam Iṟaiiḻicci Itanāl
van=titu Epp(o)ṟpaṭṭatu nīkki Uṇṇilamoḻivinṟip payireṟṟi Acalukku nīrpāyumaḷa
vu nīr pāccik kuṭuppatākavum tiruviṭavantai Āḻvār paṇṭārattār vāl pataru nīkki tai
vūrilē tevarkanmikaḷvacam Aḷantu kuṭuttu varak paṭṭu Aimpatinkala nellu Āḻvār koyiluk
ke koṭuvantu tevarkaṉmikaḷāl taravu koḷvatāner Innila Uḻukuṭimai veṭṭi Amañci kāṭṭā
titākavum Itaṟṟiṟampil taṉmāsana mutalākat tān veṇṭu kovikku nicatam nālekāl
kāṇan=taṇṭap paṭuvom taiyūrāna Irājakecari nallūrom nicati nālekāl kāṇan=taṇ
ṭa paṭṭum Innellu Aimpatin kalamum muṭṭāme Aṭṭuvatānom taiyvūrom tiruviṭavantai sabhaiyo
m Innellu Aimpatin kalamum Aḷavu koṇṭu ceyyumpaṭi tiruvamutarici nānāḻikku nel
lup patināḻiyum neyamitu Iru ceviṭaraikku nellu nāḻi Uḻakkuṅ kaṟiyamutu Onṟinukku nellu
Uriyum tayiramutukku nellu nāḻiyum Aṭaikkāyamitukku pākku nālum veṟṟilai Eṭṭukku nellu Uriye
mucceviṭu Āka Ippaṭikku nicatam tiruvamutu Ucciyampoḻtu Amutu ceyvippomāno
m Amutu ceyyomākil taṉmāsanamutalāka nicata nālekāl kāṇan=taṇṭa paṭuvomānom sabhaiyom
Itu śrī vayiṣṇava rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 36.272 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
